PURCHASE AND SALE AGREEMENT
This agreement is governed by the laws of England & Wales. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of London.
The goods sold under this contract are described in Schedule A. Delivery terms are FOB shipping point.
Title and risk of loss shall transfer to the buyer upon delivery of the goods.
Payment shall be made by bank transfer within 30 calendar days.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
